message:
feat(fp-frame): add rank, melt, and pivot_table methods

Series.rank() supports average/min/max/first/dense methods with
ascending/descending and na_option keep/top/bottom. DataFrame.rank()
applies per-column. DataFrame.melt() reshapes wide-to-long.
DataFrame.pivot_table() aggregates long-to-wide with sum/mean/count/
min/max/first. 15 new tests covering all method variants and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
